title: Magnificently Charred Tunisian Soybean Sprouts Bake
description: A charred, creamy, and show-off Tunisian dish featuring soybean sprouts, perfect for a special occasion. This keto-friendly recipe is wood-fired baked to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the wood-fired oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the soybean sprouts with olive oil, garlic, tunisian spice blend, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the soybean sprouts in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast the soybean sprouts in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until they are charred and tender.
In a separate bowl, mix the heavy cream and grated cheddar cheese until well combined.
Remove the soybean sprouts from the oven and top them with the cream and cheese mixture.
Return the baking sheet to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Remove the baking sheet from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving.
